body.name: Groundnut Oil
body.description: Wood cold-pressed from premium groundnuts. Rich, full-bodied flavor perfect for cooking and deep frying.

body.name: Coconut Oil
body.description: Pure wood cold-pressed coconut oil. Ideal for cooking, hair care, and skin nourishment.

body.name: Sweet Almond Oil
body.description: Cold-pressed from sweet almonds. Rich in Vitamin E, perfect for skin, hair, and wellness.

body.name: Sesame Oil
body.description: Available in both white and black sesame. Nutty, rich, and prized in Ayurveda for its warming properties.

body.name: Mustard Oil
body.description: Robust and pungent, traditionally wood cold-pressed. Pure authenticity in every drop.

body.name: Virgin Coconut Oil
body.description: Premium virgin coconut oil, cold-pressed from fresh coconuts. Aromatic and nutrient-rich.

body.name: Flaxseed Oil
body.description: Wood cold-pressed from flaxseeds. Packed with Omega-3 fatty acids for heart and brain health.

body.name: Niger Oil
body.description: Traditional wood cold-pressed niger seed oil. Rich in linoleic acid, valued for its health benefits.

body.name: Safflower Oil
body.description: Wood cold-pressed from premium safflower seeds. Light texture and rich in unsaturated fats for heart health.

body.name: Sunflower Oil
body.description: Wood cold-pressed from quality sunflower seeds. Rich in Vitamin E and light for everyday cooking.
